parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed of the vibrato-y pulse width modulation.
parameters-en.Freq: Controls the low pass filter's cutoff frequency, from 0.08 kHz to 18.0 kHz.
parameters-en.Attack: Controls the attack time from 0 to 2.07 seconds.
parameters-en.Pitch: Sets the pitch over a 2 octave range.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
